code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when _
  ""
end

let n = string.len(line)
mut i = 0
mut token = ""
mut result = ""
mut prev_num = 0
mut has_prev = false
mut first = true

while i <= n
  mut sep = false
  if i == n
    sep = true
  else
    let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when _
      0
    end
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
      sep = true
    else
      token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    end
  end
  if sep
    if not string.is_empty(token)
      let num = match string.parse_int(token)
      when Some(x)
        x
      when _
        0
      end
      if not has_prev or num != prev_num
        if first
          result = token
          first = false
        else
          result = "#{result} #{token}"
        end
        prev_num = num
        has_prev = true
      end
      token = ""
    end
  end
  i = i + 1
end

println(result)
